tickets.title: Checkout button unresponsive on Android 14
tickets.description: Multiple users on Android 14 report that tapping the checkout button does not trigger any action. The issue appears consistently on Samsung Galaxy S24 devices.

tickets.title: SMS verification codes not arriving
tickets.description: Users attempting two-factor authentication report that SMS codes are not being delivered. The issue is intermittent and affects approximately 20% of login attempts.

tickets.title: Fleet map not rendering vehicle positions
tickets.description: The live map on the fleet tracker screen shows no vehicle markers after the latest deployment. The API is returning data correctly but the map layer fails to render pins.

tickets.title: Invoice PDF export produces blank pages
tickets.description: Exporting an invoice to PDF results in a file with the correct page count but all pages are blank. The issue started after the billing module update on March 1st.

tickets.title: Push alerts not sent for overdue work orders
tickets.description: Field technicians are not receiving push notifications when a work order becomes overdue. The backend job appears to be running but the notification dispatch is silently failing.

tickets.title: Dashboard KPI cards show stale data
tickets.description: The summary KPI cards on the Zenith Ops Console dashboard continue to display yesterday's data even after a manual refresh. The underlying API returns fresh values correctly.

tickets.title: User avatar upload silently fails
tickets.description: When a user attempts to upload a profile avatar larger than 2MB, the upload appears to complete with no error message but the new image never appears.

tickets.title: Route optimization returns incorrect ETAs
tickets.description: The fleet route optimizer is calculating arrival times that are 30 to 40 minutes shorter than actual travel times. This is causing missed SLA commitments.

tickets.title: Subscription renewal emails have broken links
tickets.description: Renewal reminder emails sent by the billing system contain links that return a 404 error. The link path includes a deprecated route prefix that was removed last sprint.

tickets.title: Technician checklist cannot be submitted offline
tickets.description: Field technicians working in areas with no connectivity are unable to submit completed checklists. The offline queue is not persisting form data between app restarts.

tickets.title: Search results do not respect role-based access
tickets.description: Users with read-only roles are seeing results from restricted modules when using the global search bar. Access control is applied on the detail view but not the search index.

tickets.title: Payment method update fails for AMEX cards
tickets.description: Customers attempting to update their billing method to an American Express card receive a generic error. Visa and Mastercard update correctly. The payment gateway logs show a field validation error.

tickets.title: App crashes on launch for tablet form factors
tickets.description: The Apex Field Service app crashes immediately on launch when run on any Android tablet. The crash log shows a null pointer exception in the responsive layout initializer.

tickets.title: Client contact list pagination skips records
tickets.description: When paginating through the client contact list, page 3 skips 5 records that appear correctly on page 2. The issue is reproducible with any filter applied.

tickets.title: Vehicle telemetry data has 10-minute lag
tickets.description: Telemetry readings shown in the fleet tracker are consistently 10 minutes behind real time. The data pipeline shows no backlog, suggesting the issue is in the websocket subscription layer.

tickets.title: Ops console session timeout too aggressive
tickets.description: Users are being forcibly logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity. The configured timeout is 30 minutes. The issue appears to be a race condition in the token refresh logic.

tickets.title: Refund processing takes over 10 minutes
tickets.description: Refund requests submitted through the billing suite are not completing within the expected 2-minute window. The payment processor confirms the request is received immediately, suggesting the delay is internal.

tickets.title: Parts inventory count showing negative values
tickets.description: Several parts in the field service inventory are displaying negative stock counts after recent job completions. The deduction logic does not appear to check for minimum thresholds before writing.

tickets.title: Dark mode text illegible on filter chips
tickets.description: In dark mode, the label text on active filter chips uses a dark color against a dark background, making it unreadable. The issue affects all filter chip variants across the app.

tickets.title: Geofence alerts firing outside defined zones
tickets.description: Fleet vehicles are triggering geofence departure alerts while still inside the defined zones. The coordinate comparison logic appears to be using a bounding box instead of the polygon definition.

tickets.title: Report scheduler not running on weekends
tickets.description: Scheduled reports configured to run on Saturdays and Sundays are not being generated. Reports scheduled on weekdays work correctly. The cron expression appears to be correct.

tickets.title: Bulk discount codes not applying at checkout
tickets.description: When a customer applies a bulk discount code, the order total does not change. The code validation endpoint returns a successful response, but the discount amount is not passed to the cart service.

tickets.title: Signature capture loses data on screen rotation
tickets.description: When a technician rotates their device during the signature capture step, the drawn signature is cleared. The canvas state is not preserved across configuration changes.

tickets.title: Client notes field truncated in list view
tickets.description: The notes field for client records is being cut off at 50 characters in the list view even when the full text fits within the available space. The truncation is happening in the model serializer.

tickets.title: Driver duty status not syncing across devices
tickets.description: When a driver updates their duty status on one device, the change is not reflected on the dispatcher's screen without a manual page refresh. Real-time sync is not functioning for status changes.

tickets.title: User role changes not taking effect until re-login
tickets.description: When an administrator changes a user's role, the new permissions are not applied until the affected user logs out and back in. The session token is not being refreshed on role update.

tickets.title: Annual billing cycle not generating correct proration
tickets.description: When a customer upgrades mid-cycle on an annual plan, the proration calculation charges for the full remaining year instead of the prorated amount.

tickets.title: Photo attachments not uploading on iOS 18
tickets.description: Technicians using iOS 18 devices are unable to attach photos to job reports. The file picker opens correctly but selecting an image causes the app to hang indefinitely.

tickets.title: Client portal login broken for SSO users
tickets.description: Users authenticating via SSO are redirected to a blank page after the identity provider callback. The redirect URI registered in the IdP does not match the current production URL.

tickets.title: Fuel consumption report missing diesel vehicles
tickets.description: The fuel consumption report in the fleet tracker only includes petrol vehicles. Diesel vehicles are present in the system but are being excluded by an incorrect fuel type filter in the query.

tickets.title: Audit log entries missing actor information
tickets.description: Audit log records for bulk operations are missing the acting user's identity. The user context is not being passed through the async job queue that processes bulk actions.

tickets.title: Tax calculation incorrect for Canadian provinces
tickets.description: Orders placed with a Canadian billing address are being charged the wrong provincial tax rate. The tax table was updated last quarter but the billing service is still using the old cached rates.

tickets.title: Work order reassignment not notifying new assignee
tickets.description: When a work order is reassigned to a different technician, the new assignee does not receive a notification. The notification event fires but the recipient resolver is returning the old assignee's ID.

tickets.title: Client contract expiry dates showing wrong year
tickets.description: Contract records with an expiry date in 2027 are displaying as 2026 in the client hub. The date parsing function is dropping the timezone offset, causing a one-day rollback that shifts the year.

tickets.title: Fleet maintenance reminders sent in wrong timezone
tickets.description: Maintenance reminder notifications are being sent at the correct UTC time but display the wrong local time for drivers in non-UTC timezones. The timezone conversion is missing for notification delivery.

tickets.title: Custom widget builder crashes on empty template
tickets.description: Attempting to preview a dashboard widget with no template content causes the ops console to crash. An empty template should render a placeholder state, not throw an unhandled exception.

tickets.title: Grace period not applied on overdue invoices
tickets.description: Invoices are being flagged as delinquent immediately after the due date rather than after the configured 5-day grace period. The grace period setting is present in the database but is not being read by the delinquency checker.

tickets.title: Job timer does not pause when app is backgrounded
tickets.description: The job duration timer continues counting when the technician backgrounds the app. The timer should pause when the app is in the background and resume when it returns to the foreground.

tickets.title: Client hub slow to load with 1000+ contacts
tickets.description: Organizations with over 1000 contacts experience load times exceeding 15 seconds on the contact list screen. The query is fetching all records without pagination at the data layer.

tickets.title: Map satellite view unavailable in offline mode
tickets.description: When the device has no network connection, switching to satellite map view shows a grey grid. Tile caching for the satellite layer is not being preloaded as part of the offline bundle.

tickets.title: Alert rules duplicated after config import
tickets.description: Importing an alert configuration file into the ops console results in all existing alert rules being duplicated. The import process should upsert rules rather than always insert.

tickets.title: Trial expiry not blocking access on time
tickets.description: Trial accounts continue to have full access for up to 48 hours after their trial period expires. The expiry check runs as a scheduled job that is not being triggered on time.

tickets.title: Equipment QR scanner not working under fluorescent lighting
tickets.description: The in-app QR scanner for scanning equipment barcodes fails to resolve codes under certain fluorescent lighting conditions. The scan succeeds when a flashlight is used.

tickets.title: Archived clients appearing in active search results
tickets.description: Clients that have been archived are still appearing in search results when the active-only filter is enabled. The search index is not being updated when a client's archive status changes.

tickets.title: Speed alert threshold not saved after update
tickets.description: When a fleet manager updates the speed alert threshold in vehicle settings, the change appears to save but reverts to the previous value after a page reload. The PATCH request is returning 200 but the value is not being persisted.

tickets.title: Multi-tenant data bleeding between org contexts
tickets.description: In rare conditions, users in one organization are seeing records belonging to a different organization. The tenant context resolver has a race condition when handling concurrent requests.

tickets.title: Enterprise plan invoice line items not itemized
tickets.description: Enterprise plan invoices are showing a single line item for the total amount rather than itemized lines per seat and add-on. The invoice renderer is not expanding the line item template for enterprise tier.

tickets.title: Checklist template changes not versioned
tickets.description: When a checklist template is edited, submitted job reports referencing the old template version are retroactively updated. Template changes should create a new version rather than modifying the existing one.

tickets.title: Contact import CSV fails on special characters
tickets.description: Importing a CSV of contacts fails when any field contains an accented character or em dash. The import parser is not handling UTF-8 encoding correctly.

tickets.title: Trip history export button missing for depot users
tickets.description: Depot-level user accounts do not see the trip history export button that is visible to fleet manager accounts. The button is rendered conditionally based on role but the depot role check has an incorrect role string.

tickets.title: Graph axes labels overlap on small screens
tickets.description: On devices with screen widths below 360dp, the x-axis labels on line chart widgets overlap and become unreadable. The label renderer does not apply rotation for small viewports.

tickets.title: Coupon codes expire before stated end date
tickets.description: Customers are reporting that valid coupon codes are being rejected before the advertised expiry date. The expiry comparison is using server time in UTC while the displayed date is in local time.

tickets.title: Job notes not visible to dispatchers after sync
tickets.description: Notes added by technicians during a job are not visible to dispatchers until the technician explicitly closes the job. The notes should sync in real time, not just on job close.

tickets.title: Email notifications sent multiple times for one event
tickets.description: Some system events are triggering 3 to 5 duplicate email notifications. The event listener appears to be registered multiple times due to a missing deregistration on widget dispose.

tickets.title: Trailer attachment not linked to vehicle record
tickets.description: When a trailer is attached to a vehicle through the dispatch screen, the link is saved in the UI state but not persisted to the database. A page refresh causes the trailer association to disappear.

tickets.title: Bulk user deactivation only deactivates first 50 records
tickets.description: When an admin selects and deactivates more than 50 users at once, only the first 50 are deactivated. The bulk operation is silently truncating the input list before processing.

tickets.title: Currency symbol not updating after locale change
tickets.description: When a user changes their preferred locale in account settings, the currency symbol on invoices and checkout screens does not update until the user logs out and back in.

tickets.title: Photo evidence required prompt not shown on completion
tickets.description: Jobs configured to require photo evidence before completion do not show the validation prompt when a technician attempts to close them without photos. The validation check is missing from the completion flow.

tickets.title: Client portal shows incorrect plan tier
tickets.description: After a plan upgrade, the client portal continues to display the previous plan name in the account overview. The plan name is read from a cached profile response that is not invalidated on plan change.

tickets.title: Route replay skips segments for idle vehicles
tickets.description: The route replay feature in fleet tracker skips over time segments where a vehicle was idle for more than 5 minutes. The replay should show the vehicle parked during idle segments rather than jumping to the next movement.

tickets.title: Ops console API keys not masked in settings page
tickets.description: API keys displayed on the integrations settings page show the full key value instead of masking all but the last 4 characters. This is a security concern for shared workstations.

tickets.title: Credit note amount not deducted from next invoice
tickets.description: Credit notes issued to customers are not being automatically applied to their next invoice. The credit balance is visible in the customer record but the invoice generator does not check for available credits before billing.

tickets.title: Asset assignment history not displayed in detail view
tickets.description: The asset detail view in field service does not show the assignment history for the asset. The data is being fetched but the history list widget is hidden behind a zero-height container.

tickets.title: Activity feed duplicates entries on rapid scroll
tickets.description: When scrolling quickly through the client activity feed, some entries appear duplicated. The deduplication check in the feed aggregator is not comparing IDs correctly when items arrive out of order.

tickets.title: Driver logbook export missing rest period entries
tickets.description: When exporting a driver logbook to PDF, mandatory rest period entries are omitted from the exported document. Rest periods appear correctly in the on-screen view.

tickets.title: Webhook delivery retries not respecting backoff
tickets.description: Failed webhook deliveries are being retried every 10 seconds regardless of the configured exponential backoff settings. The backoff configuration is read but not applied to the retry scheduler.

tickets.title: Seat count not decremented on user deletion
tickets.description: When a user account is deleted, the organization's active seat count is not decremented. This causes organizations to see incorrect seat utilization and be blocked from adding new users when seats are actually available.

tickets.title: Recurring job schedule generator skips leap day
tickets.description: Recurring jobs scheduled with a monthly frequency skip February 29th on leap years and do not reschedule for March 1st. The schedule generator does not account for months with fewer than 31 days.

tickets.title: Account merge duplicates all contact records
tickets.description: When two client accounts are merged, all contacts from both accounts are duplicated rather than deduplicated by email address. The merge logic creates new records instead of updating existing ones.

tickets.title: HOS clock resets incorrectly at midnight
tickets.description: Hours of service clocks for drivers in certain timezones are resetting at midnight UTC instead of midnight in the driver's home timezone. This causes drivers to lose available hours prematurely.

tickets.title: Console API usage stats graph not loading
tickets.description: The API usage statistics graph on the developer settings page remains blank after loading. The chart data request returns a 200 with valid data but the chart component is not rendering it.

tickets.title: Payment receipt PDF missing company logo
tickets.description: Payment receipts exported as PDF are missing the company logo that appears correctly in the web view. The PDF renderer is not resolving relative asset paths for logo images.

tickets.title: Technician availability calendar not syncing public holidays
tickets.description: Public holidays are not being marked as unavailable on the technician availability calendar. The holiday sync job runs successfully but the holidays are not mapped to the correct region for each technician.

tickets.title: Client portal two-factor backup codes not generated
tickets.description: When a user enables two-factor authentication, the backup recovery codes are not generated or displayed. The 2FA setup wizard completes without error but skips the backup code step.

tickets.title: Fuel card transaction reconciliation fails on weekends
tickets.description: The automated reconciliation of fuel card transactions fails every Saturday and Sunday with a gateway timeout. The fuel card provider's reconciliation API has lower rate limits on weekends that the system does not account for.

tickets.title: Console audit trail not capturing read events
tickets.description: The audit trail is correctly capturing write and delete events but is not logging read access to sensitive record types. The read event hook is present in the code but is conditionally disabled by a feature flag that is off in production.

tickets.title: Dunning sequence sending final notice too early
tickets.description: The third and final dunning email is being sent 2 days after the first notice instead of after 14 days as configured. The dunning schedule interval is being read in hours instead of days.

tickets.title: Customer feedback form not saving on first submit
tickets.description: The post-job customer feedback form requires users to tap the submit button twice before saving. The first tap triggers validation correctly but does not invoke the save action.

tickets.title: Client hub import wizard hangs on large files
tickets.description: Importing a CSV contact file larger than 5MB causes the import wizard to stop responding after the file validation step. The wizard does not show an error and the upload spinner continues indefinitely.

tickets.title: Vehicle inspection report photos not downloading
tickets.description: Photos attached to vehicle inspection reports cannot be downloaded by fleet managers. Clicking the download link returns a 403 error. The signed URL generation is using the wrong IAM role for fleet manager accounts.

tickets.title: Integration health check showing false positives
tickets.description: The integration status page shows all integrations as healthy even when the connected services are unreachable. The health check is pinging the wrong endpoint and always receiving a cached success response.

tickets.title: Stripe webhook signature validation failing in staging
tickets.description: Stripe webhook events are failing signature validation in the staging environment. The webhook secret in the staging environment variable was rotated but the billing service was not redeployed to pick up the new value.

tickets.title: Technician travel time not included in job cost
tickets.description: The job costing report does not include technician travel time in the calculated labour cost. Travel time is tracked and stored but the cost calculation query does not join the travel time records.

tickets.title: Notification preferences not applying for new users
tickets.description: New user accounts are not inheriting the organization's default notification preferences. New users receive all notification types regardless of the organization's configured defaults.

tickets.title: Fleet map clusters not expanding on tap
tickets.description: When multiple vehicle markers are grouped into a cluster on the map, tapping the cluster does not expand it to show individual vehicles. The cluster tap handler is attached but the expand animation is not triggering.

tickets.title: Ops console search returning deleted records
tickets.description: The global search in the ops console is returning records that have been soft-deleted. The search index is not being updated when a record is deleted, so deleted records remain searchable.

tickets.title: Automatic plan downgrade not processing at term end
tickets.description: When a customer opts to downgrade their plan at the end of the current term, the downgrade is not being applied at term end. The scheduled downgrade job is queued correctly but is not being picked up by the worker.

tickets.title: Parts request approval workflow stuck in pending
tickets.description: Parts requests that require manager approval are stuck in pending status even after the manager approves them. The approval event is being recorded but is not transitioning the request to the approved state.

tickets.title: Client hub API rate limit headers not returned
tickets.description: The client hub API is not returning X-RateLimit headers in responses. Third-party integrations that depend on these headers to manage request pacing are hitting rate limits unexpectedly.

tickets.title: Maintenance schedule PDF uses wrong date format
tickets.description: Maintenance schedule PDFs exported for European customers show dates in MM/DD/YYYY format instead of DD/MM/YYYY. The locale is being detected correctly but the date formatter is using the default US locale.

tickets.title: Workspace settings save button always disabled
tickets.description: The save button on the workspace settings page remains disabled even after making changes to the form fields. The button's enabled state is bound to a dirty flag that is not being set when fields change.

tickets.title: Failed payment retry not notifying billing contact
tickets.description: When a payment fails and is automatically retried, the billing contact is not receiving a notification for the failed attempt. Notifications are only sent on the final failure, not on each retry.

tickets.title: Technician skill matrix not filtering job assignments
tickets.description: Jobs that require specific technician skills are being assigned to technicians who do not have those skills. The skill filter in the assignment algorithm is reading from a stale in-memory cache instead of the database.

tickets.title: Orion hub deep link opens wrong section on iOS
tickets.description: Deep links to specific client records from email notifications open the app on the home screen rather than navigating directly to the record. The deep link path is parsed correctly but the navigation state is not initialized before the route push.

tickets.title: Driver hours summary miscounting split shifts
tickets.description: When a driver works a split shift, the hours summary is counting the gap between shifts as worked time. The summary should only sum the active duty segments.

tickets.title: Ops dashboard timezone picker resets on page reload
tickets.description: The timezone selected in the ops dashboard does not persist across page reloads. The selection is saved to localStorage but is not being read back on page initialization.

tickets.title: Subscription cancellation confirmation email not sent
tickets.description: Customers who cancel their subscription through the self-serve portal do not receive a cancellation confirmation email. The cancellation is processed correctly but the email event is not being emitted.

tickets.title: Job completion report not generated for cancelled jobs
tickets.description: When a job is cancelled mid-execution, no completion report is generated. Cancelled jobs should still produce a partial report capturing the work done before cancellation.

tickets.title: Client hub API returns 500 on empty filter payload
tickets.description: Sending a filter request with an empty JSON body to the contacts endpoint returns a 500 internal server error instead of returning all contacts. The filter deserializer is not handling the empty case.

tickets.title: Fleet carbon emissions report includes off-fleet vehicles
tickets.description: The carbon emissions summary report is including vehicles that were removed from the fleet during the report period. Removed vehicles should be excluded or shown separately as historical entries.
